oilpricesris.title_zh: 美伊和平谈判陷入僵局油价上涨
oilpricesris.summary_zh: 特朗普总统表示，美国已取消派遣团队前往巴基斯坦进行谈判的计划。
oilpricesris.why_it_matters_zh: 该事件可能影响地缘政治、能源、宏观定价，当前方向判断为偏利多，仍需结合价格和更多信源复核。

europeanmark.title_zh: 据报道伊朗提出和平提议，欧洲市场小幅走高
europeanmark.summary_zh: 由于投资者密切关注陷入僵局的伊朗-美国局势，欧洲股市在新交易周开始时小幅走高。和平谈判。
europeanmark.why_it_matters_zh: 该事件可能影响地缘政治、市场、宏观定价，当前方向判断为偏利多，仍需结合价格和更多信源复核。

chinablocksm.title_zh: 中国阻止 Meta 以 20 亿美元收购人工智能初创公司 Manus
chinablocksm.summary_zh: 中国周一表示，已决定阻止 Meta 以 20 亿美元收购 Manus，这是一家源自中国的新加坡人工智能初创公司。
chinablocksm.why_it_matters_zh: 该事件可能影响地缘政治、科技、宏观定价，当前方向判断为偏利多，仍需结合价格和更多信源复核。

chinaseconom.title_zh: 中国经济因伊朗战争开始出现裂痕
chinaseconom.summary_zh: 中国的石油和天然气战略储备在一定程度上使其免受影响，但其以制造业为基础的经济开始动摇。
chinaseconom.why_it_matters_zh: 该事件可能影响地缘政治、能源、宏观定价，当前方向判断为分化，仍需结合价格和更多信源复核。

chinawillreq.title_zh: 中国将要求 Meta 解除对人工智能初创公司 Manus 的收购
chinawillreq.summary_zh: 该裁决的影响尚不清楚，但它可能向寻求与外国公司合作的中国科技创始人发出令人不寒而栗的信号。
chinawillreq.why_it_matters_zh: 该事件可能影响地缘政治、科技、宏观定价，当前方向判断为偏利多，仍需结合价格和更多信源复核。

malisdefense.title_zh: 马里国防部长在伊斯兰叛乱分子袭击中丧生
malisdefense.summary_zh: 该国军政府核心人物、部长萨迪奥·卡马拉将军去世之际，该地区暴力事件不断升级。
malisdefense.why_it_matters_zh: 该事件可能影响地缘政治定价，当前方向判断为中性，仍需结合价格和更多信源复核。

articles.title: Mali in turmoil after insurgents seize towns and kill defence minister
articles.summary: Military intelligence chief reportedly also killed in sweeping attacks by jihadists and separatist rebels Mali has been left reeling from sweeping attacks by jihadists and separatist rebels who seized several towns and military bases and killed the defence minister and military intelligence chief. The weekend assault on the west African state’s security architecture was coordinated by al-Qaida-affiliated Jama’at Nusrat al-Islam wal-Muslimin (JNIM) and the separatist Tuareg-led movement Azawad Liberation Front (FLA) – former foes with distinct agendas. Continue reading...
articles.content: Military intelligence chief reportedly also killed in sweeping attacks by jihadists and separatist rebels Mali has been left reeling from sweeping attacks by jihadists and separatist rebels who seized several towns and military bases and killed the defence minister and military intelligence chief. The weekend assault on the west African state’s security architecture was coordinated by al-Qaida-affiliated Jama’at Nusrat al-Islam wal-Muslimin (JNIM) and the separatist Tuareg-led movement Azawad Liberation Front (FLA) – former foes with distinct agendas. Continue reading...

articles.title: Mali defence minister killed amid flurry of insurgent attacks
articles.summary: Car bomb kills Sadio Camara at home during coordinated assaults by rebel groups including West African al-Qaida affiliate Mali’s defence minister was killed in an attack on his residence, the government said on Sunday, a high-profile fatality during coordinated assaults staged the previous day by insurgents including the West African affiliate of al-Qaida. A car laden with explosives driven by a suicide attacker drove into Sadio Camara’s residence in the town of Kati, the spokesperson, Issa Ousmane Coulibaly, said in a statement read out on state television. A firefight ensued, and Camara sustained injuries from which he later died in a hospital, Coulibaly said, adding that Mali would observe two days of mourning. Continue reading...
articles.content: Car bomb kills Sadio Camara at home during coordinated assaults by rebel groups including West African al-Qaida affiliate Mali’s defence minister was killed in an attack on his residence, the government said on Sunday, a high-profile fatality during coordinated assaults staged the previous day by insurgents including the West African affiliate of al-Qaida. A car laden with explosives driven by a suicide attacker drove into Sadio Camara’s residence in the town of Kati, the spokesperson, Issa Ousmane Coulibaly, said in a statement read out on state television. A firefight ensued, and Camara sustained injuries from which he later died in a hospital, Coulibaly said, adding that Mali would observe two days of mourning. Continue reading...

active_items.title: WTI 原油单日冲击
active_items.action: 下次报告重点看能源、航运、电力、黄金的传导，不把新能源当第一反应。

active_items.title: 广义成长科技暴露触及上限
active_items.action: 新增资金优先回流宽基、红利低波或黄金，不继续堆成长仓。

active_items.title: 直接 AI 暴露触及上限
active_items.action: 停止新增同类 AI/半导体/港股科技，优先复核重叠和单仓上限。

active_items.title: 黄金仓位低于保险仓下限
active_items.action: 复核是否需要把新增资金的一部分补回黄金保险仓；仍需看价格、溢价和组合整体仓位。

active_items.title: 黄金仓位高于保险仓上限
active_items.action: 提醒不要把黄金当收益主攻；如继续上冲，优先复核是否只保留保险仓功能。

active_items.title: 黄金期货单日大涨
active_items.action: 只做保险仓复核，不追高；看美元指数和美债收益率是否同步支持。

active_items.title: 黄金期货单日大跌
active_items.action: 先确认是否是美元/实际利率驱动；如黄金仓位低于目标区间，再考虑是否分批补保险仓。
